emergency_definition: When an emergency comes in after hours, who should Clara try to reach

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Take message (name, number, address, issue description) and assure callback

non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Collect info and promise callback next business day

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I apologize, I wasn't able to connect you. Let me take your information and someone will call you back shortly.

integration_constraints: We do NOT want any sprinkler jobs created automatically in ServiceTrade
after_hours_flow_summary:
1. Greet caller
2. Ask purpose of call
3. Determine if emergency or non-emergency
4. Emergency triggers: Sprinkler leak, Active fire alarm, Those need immediate response, 24/7...
5. Emergency: collect name, number, address -> attempt transfer
6. If transfer fails: take message, assure callback
7. Non-emergency: collect info, promise callback next business day
8. Ask 'Is there anything else I can help with?'
9. Close call
office_hours_flow_summary:
1. Greet caller
2. Ask purpose of call
3. Collect caller name and callback number
4. Transfer to main office line
5. If transfer fails: take message, confirm follow-up
6. Ask 'Is there anything else I can help with?'
7. Close call
questions_or_unknowns: Emergency routing phone numbers not provided
notes: Auto-extracted from demo call transcript for Guardian Alarm & Sprinkler Co.. Services: 7 identified. Emergency triggers: 4 defined. Flagged 2 unknown(s) for human review.
